claim_boundary: This proves production runtime execution for the exact registered vanilla-token templates and the closed stack-spell type predicate grammar. It does not close T3.5, verify token subtypes, support non-vanilla token text, or semantically verify cards.
source_binding: The kernel, interpreter, smoke harness, tests, ADR record, specification, plan state, and this evidence record are committed together.
production_path: Operation::CreateToken compiles only exact token-script registry entries, positive literal counts bounded at 64, and supported player bindings
all target-derived players and amounts are bound and kernel-validated before the first effect action mutates state
Action::CreateToken creates a battlefield token with exact owner, controller, base types, color, power, and toughness
stack spell predicates compile only type_is, not(type_is), and type_is unions
TargetPredicate::Object validates the physical spell object represented by a stack entry
the smoke harness selects a legal satisfying stack spell and checks every action, token postcondition, zone, view, and deterministic hash
fail_closed_boundaries: token templates with keywords, abilities, or unresolved metadata remain unsupported
nonliteral, zero, and over-limit token counts remain unsupported
stack predicates outside the closed type grammar remain unsupported
ability-only stack entries cannot satisfy spell object predicates

verification.result: pass: all workspace unit, integration, and doc tests

verification.command: cargo clippy --offline -p forge-core -p forge-cards -p forge-testkit --all-targets -- -D warnings

verification.result: expected exit 2 because unsupported definitions remain; 567 passed, 19515 unsupported, 0 failed
